texto: The least known among the virtues and also the most misunderstood is the virtue of humility. Yet, it is the very groundwork of Christianity. Humility is a grace of the soul that cannot be expressed in words and is only known by experience. It is an unspeakable treasure of God, and only can be called the gift of God. "Learn," He said, not from angels, not from men, not from books; but learn from My presence, light, and action within you, "that I am meek and humble of heart, and you shall find rest to your souls".
explicacao: Citação de William Bernard Ullathorne sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “The least known among the virtues and also the most misunderstood is the virtue of humility. Yet,…” articula amor, humility, meekness em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e meekness.
